report.summary: Quiet cycle: no new commits or deploys. 2 pages promoted from queue (eclipse-svm, walrus-storage), uncommitted files grew 195→205, TS errors and API routes stable.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 558 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (+4 from prior cycle count of 554), 2 in PUBLISH_QUEUE (eclipse-svm-layer-2, walrus-decentralized-storage)
103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files (unchanged backlog)
102 TypeScript errors in 4 app files (UNCHANGED): lido-v3-stvaults (JSX syntax), crypto-arbitrage (unescaped >), institutional-adoption (unescaped $1B), crypto-index-funds (unescaped >)
structured-data.examples.ts still has ~40 TS errors — reference file, not imported in build
Build uses ignoreBuildErrors: true — TS errors do not block Vercel deploys
No new regressions detected — error set is stable from prior cycle

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally intact: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s/swr120), trending (300s/swr600), fear-greed (600s/swr1200), market-metrics (60s/swr120), market-dominance (300s/swr600), defi-yields (dynamic CACHE_DURATION)
Fallback data: only prices and market-dominance have FALLBACK_DATA. 4 routes still lack fallbacks
CRITICAL: 0/6 API routes have rate limiting. Rate limiter module at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts remains unused
No code changes to API routes this cycle — all stable
Cannot verify live responses from sandbox (egress blocked)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
205 uncommitted files: 177 untracked + 28 modified (up from 195 last cycle — grew by 10)
No new commits or deploys since last cycle — production still running commit 21aaf5b
next.config.ts: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, ignoreBuildErrors=true
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from sandbox (degen0x.com egress blocked)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Delta this cycle: 2 new pages promoted from queue to published (eclipse-svm-layer-2, walrus-decentralized-storage), 10 uncommitted files added
No commits or deploys this cycle — content accumulation continues
BLOCKER [P0]: 205 uncommitted files need commit + push + Vercel deploy. Gap widening (195→205)
Carry-over [P1]: Fix 4 learn pages with JSX escaping errors — 102 TS errors
Carry-over [P1]: Add rate limiting to 6 API routes — rate limiter module exists but unused
Carry-over [P2]: Add fallback data to 4 API routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields)
Carry-over [P2]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx files (long-standing backlog)
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages remaining (eclipse-svm-layer-2, walrus-decentralized-storage)
